data.name: Dominated By: Sadistic Valentine
data.detailed_description:
A few days before Valentine's Day, you get caught by a sadistic woman who blackmails you and forces you to run errands for her. Just when you think that you'll be spending Valentine's Day alone, your sadistic blackmailer forces you to spend Valentine's Day with her

Kita from "Dominated By: Nerdy Childhood Friend" makes a short cameo in this story

  • Full nudity H-Scenes

  • ~6.7K words

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 27 Unique character images

  • 28 Total character images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

  • 2 Endings

The native language of this game is English. Other languages are machine translated

data.short_description: Your sadistic blackmailer forces you to be her date on Valentine's Day
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
